name: meta-ad-library-monitor
description: Search Meta Ad Library data and normalize competitor creative, page, delivery window, and platform fields.
business_value: Competitive ad intelligence and marketing message tracking.

auth.note: Meta developer access and policy eligibility apply.

verification_result: Example fixture validates ad intelligence rows with creative, page, platform, and delivery fields.
known_risks: Requires Meta developer access and a valid token.
Available ad types and fields vary by country and policy rules.
Creative and delivery fields may be partial.
